hooks.command: COMMAND=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /Users/wang/Desktop/Varogo/apps/backend && pnpm test:unit --passWithNoTests; fi

COMMAND=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /Users/wang/Desktop/Varogo/apps/backend && ERRORS=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -E 'error TS' | head -20); if [ -n "$ERRORS" ]; then echo "[tsc] TypeScript errors:"; echo "$ERRORS"; exit 2; fi; fi

COMMAND=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /Users/wang/Desktop/Varogo/apps/frontend && OUTPUT=$(pnpm test 2>&1 | tail -15); echo "$OUTPUT"; echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -qE 'FAIL|Tests:.*failed' && exit 2 || true; fi

COMMAND=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /Users/wang/Desktop/Varogo/apps/frontend && ERRORS=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -E 'error TS' | head -20); if [ -n "$ERRORS" ]; then echo "[tsc] TypeScript errors:"; echo "$ERRORS"; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ prisma/schema\.prisma$ ]]; then cd /Users/wang/Desktop/Varogo/apps/backend && npx prisma generate 2>&1; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ apps/backend/src/.*\.spec\.ts$ ]] && [[ ! "$FILE" =~ \.integration\.spec\.ts$ ]]; then cd /Users/wang/Desktop/Varogo/apps/backend && OUTPUT=$(pnpm test:unit --passWithNoTests 2>&1 | tail -15); echo "$OUTPUT"; echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -qE 'FAIL|Tests:.*failed' && exit 2 || true; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ apps/backend/src/.*\.integration\.spec\.ts$ ]]; then cd /Users/wang/Desktop/Varogo/apps/backend && if ! docker compose -f ../../docker-compose.yml ps postgres 2>/dev/null | grep -q running; then echo '[skip] integration test: postgres container not running'; exit 0; fi && pnpm test:integration 2>&1 | tail -10; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ apps/frontend/src/.*\.test\.tsx?$ ]]; then cd /Users/wang/Desktop/Varogo/apps/frontend && pnpm test 2>&1 | tail -10; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ apps/backend/src/.*\.ts$ ]]; then cd /Users/wang/Desktop/Varogo/apps/backend && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>&1; ERRORS=$(npx eslint "$FILE" 2>&1); RC=$?; if [ $RC -ne 0 ]; then echo "[eslint] $FILE"; echo "$ERRORS"; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ apps/frontend/src/.*\.tsx?$ ]]; then cd /Users/wang/Desktop/Varogo/apps/frontend && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>&1; ERRORS=$(npx eslint "$FILE" 2>&1); RC=$?; if [ $RC -ne 0 ]; then echo "[eslint] $FILE"; echo "$ERRORS"; exit 2; fi; fi
